comment.body: This setup is key to master. Together with macro and greeks analysis. Very powerful. But need a framework to work with....... All in all, look how negative the news were running into this low from 5/27. Once it flushed there, have to monitor how price behaves, IV, options flow, etc. And from there you have a well defined setup which will either work or not. And the feedback does not take long to manifest. Once it flushes I like to place a AVWAP from the drops to confirm entry(ies) with stop at lows on a lower TF chart. Then all you have to do is trail your stops..... You can see in larger TF chart there were 2 setups for both last and this Friday. But they are all over the place...... Keep in mind they are very easy to see after the fact. But you need to train yourself to see it as it is building or unfolding to be prepared to pull the trigger with more confidence. Imagine when playing any sport you do visualization exercises previous to your game, so that when the situation arises, your mind already did it, and your body is only reacting to the play. Remember these are high probability setups. Keyword "probability".
